message:
fix: Improve URL detection for HTTPS and reverse proxy deployments

- Use correct protocol (https/wss vs http/ws) based on page protocol
- Only append port to URLs when explicitly present in location
- Handle reverse proxy deployments (no port) correctly
- Maintain file:// fallback for edge cases

This fixes issues when running behind nginx or other reverse proxies,
and prevents mixed-content errors when accessed via HTTPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
